docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY APARICIO, LISETTE A. AS TO DEFENDANT MENJIVAR, CESAR E. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-20-2002 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $3,887.00 AS TO DEFENDANT MENJIVAR, CESAR E.
